# Stress Strain

**Summary**: The relationship between the applied stress and the resulting strain in a material.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021]] analyzed the stress-strain relationship to determine elastic constants.

## Scientific Context

- [[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021]] Determines the elastic limits and deformation behavior of the rock matrix.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021]] derived from stress-strain curves generated during simulation.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The presence of asphaltene with 62 molecules reduced the elastic region of the structure by nearly 70% compared to kerogen. ([[2021-aslanov|Aslanov, 2021, p. 57]])
